title: Citrix security advisory (AV26-702)
description: On July 14, 2026, Citrix published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: Citrix Secure Access Client for Windows   versions prior to 26.6.1.20
Citrix Endpoint Analysis Client for Windows   versions prior to 26.5.1.7
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
